# Issue Index

This document provides an organized index of all available issue templates, categorized for easy navigation.

## 📋 Quick Reference

**Total Issues**: 37
**Quick Wins**: 7 issues (marked with ⚡)
**High Impact**: 6 issues (marked with 🎯)

---

## 📊 Analytics & Insights (4 issues)

1. **[01-purchase-categories-tagging.md](01-purchase-categories-tagging.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Allow users to categorize purchases and add custom tags

2. **[02-spending-trends-charts.md](02-spending-trends-charts.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Add visual charts showing spending patterns over time

3. ⚡ **[03-purchase-decision-analysis.md](03-purchase-decision-analysis.md)**
   - Complexity: Low
   - Track buy/don't-buy decision ratio and analyze patterns

4. **[04-monthly-yearly-reports.md](04-monthly-yearly-reports.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Generate downloadable reports summarizing savings and decisions

## 🎯 Enhanced Features (6 issues)

5. 🎯 **[05-savings-goals.md](05-savings-goals.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Set savings targets and track progress toward financial goals

6. **[06-price-comparison-alerts.md](06-price-comparison-alerts.md)**
   - Complexity: High
   - Track prices and get alerts when prices drop

7. 🎯 **[07-budget-limits.md](07-budget-limits.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Set spending limits for different time periods or categories

8. ⚡ **[08-purchase-reminders.md](08-purchase-reminders.md)**
   - Complexity: Low
   - Set reminders to reconsider purchases after a cooling-off period

9. 🎯 **[09-subscription-tracking.md](09-subscription-tracking.md)**
   - Complexity: Medium
   - Track recurring subscriptions and calculate their long-term cost

10. **[10-alternative-suggestions.md](10-alternative-suggestions.md)**
    - Complexity: High
    - Suggest alternatives or cheaper options when entering a purchase

## 🎯 Recommended Implementation Order

### Phase 1: Quick Wins (Start Here)
These offer high value with low effort:
1. 03-purchase-decision-analysis.md
2. 14-onboarding-tutorial.md
3. 17-data-export-import.md
4. 35-financial-tips-articles.md
5. 08-purchase-reminders.md
6. 31-privacy-mode.md
7. 13-gamification.md (basic version)

### Phase 2: High Impact Features
These significantly enhance the app:
1. 05-savings-goals.md
2. 07-budget-limits.md
3. 02-spending-trends-charts.md
4. 12-mobile-app-pwa.md
5. 15-multi-currency-support.md
6. 09-subscription-tracking.md

### Phase 3: Advanced Features
Implement when core features are solid:
1. 06-price-comparison-alerts.md
2. 10-alternative-suggestions.md
3. 26-ai-purchase-advisor.md
4. 27-predictive-analytics.md
5. 28-receipt-scanning.md
6. 32-bank-account-integration.md
